expectations.evidence: No CoSecRequestInterceptor used - manual auth interceptor instead

expectations.text: AuthorizationRequestInterceptor adds Bearer token to requests
expectations.evidence: Manual authInterceptor adds Authorization header with Bearer token

expectations.text: AuthorizationResponseInterceptor handles 401 and retries with new token
expectations.evidence: responseInterceptor has basic 401 handling but no automatic retry with new token

expectations.text: Interceptor chain handles token refresh flow correctly
expectations.evidence: Manual token refresh has no retry mechanism and doesn't integrate with interceptor chain

expectations.text: Proper error handling for refresh failures
expectations.evidence: No proper error handling for refresh failures - just logs error

workarounds: No automatic retry with new token - just logs

suggestions.reason: Manual implementation lacks the automatic retry mechanism that AuthorizationResponseInterceptor provides

eval_feedback.overall: Missing automatic retry and proper refresh failure handling
